2606.30374.title: Set-Inclusive Uncertainty Modeling for Robust Brain Tumor Segmentation
2606.30374.paper_summary: Multimodal MRI is essential for accurate brain tumor segmentation. However, acquiring all modalities at inference is often challenging in practice, which causes intrinsic uncertainty due to unavoidable information loss. Without modeling this uncertainty, existing methods encode incomplete evidence into deterministic representations that appear plausible but lack reliability. In this regime, we propose a probabilistic representation framework that models representations as Gaussian distributions, where their mean captures task information and their variance measures uncertainty from missing evidence. To make variance reflect information deficiency, we regularize the mean from each partial configuration toward its full-modality counterpart, while scaling the variance with the discrepancy between their aligned means. We further introduce a set-inclusive strategy that exploits the hierarchical structure of modality subsets and enforces an ordering constraint to maintain their consistent uncertainty relationships. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2018 and 2020 demonstrate that our approach offers superior performance over baselines across diverse missing-modality scenarios. Code and model checkpoint are available at https://github.com/atlas-sky/SIUM.
2606.30374.paper_summary_zh: 多模態 MRI 對於準確的腦腫瘤分割至關重要。<lb/>然而，在推理過程中獲取所有模態在實踐中往往具有挑戰性，這會導致由於不可避免的信息損失而產生內在的不確定性。<lb/>如果不對這種不確定性進行建模，現有方法會將不完整的證據編碼為看似合理但缺乏可靠性的確定性表示。<lb/>在這種情況下，我們提出了一種概率表示框架，將表示建模為高斯分佈，其中其均值捕捉任務信息，而其方差則衡量由於缺失證據而產生的不確定性。<lb/>為了使方差反映信息不足，我們將每個部分配置的均值正則化到其全模態對應物，並根據它們對齊均值之間的差異來縮放方差。<lb/>我們進一步引入了一種集合包含策略，利用模態子集的層次結構，並強制執行排序約束以維持其一致的不確定性關係。<lb/>在 BraTS 2018 和 2020 上的廣泛實驗表明，我們的方法在各種缺失模態場景中提供了優於基線的性能。<lb/>代碼和模型檢查點可在 https://github.com/atlas-sky/SIUM 獲得。
2606.30374.author: Seunghun Baek et.al.
2606.30374.authors: Seunghun Baek, Jihwan Park, Jaeyoon Sim, Hoseok Lee, Seungjoo Lee, Won Hwa Kim
